news.t: First Trust Adds to Strength Lineup with the First Trust Growth Strength ETF

holdings.infoBox: FTGS is an equity ETF with a total of 51 individual holdings. The top holdings are Fortinet stock at 3.57%, Palo Alto Networks at 3.32%, Cadence Design Systems at 2.48%, Eli Lilly and Company at 2.38%, and Monster Beverage at 2.38%.

overview.description: The First Trust Growth Strength ETF (FTGS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the The Growth Strength index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of 50 well-capitalized, large-cap companies with strong market positions in the US. The fund uses various fundamental metrics to select growth equities. FTGS was launched on Oct 25, 2022 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: First Trust Adds to Strength Lineup with the First Trust Growth Strength ETF
